texto: In music the punctuation is absolutely strict the bars and the rests are absolutely defined. But our punctuation cannot be quite strict because we have to relate it to the audience. In other words we are continually changing the score.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Ralph Richardson sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “In music the punctuation is absolutely strict the bars and the rests are absolutely defined. But …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, acting, theatre, útil em momentos de theatre.
